purpose: Expanded deck-607 hand-filter same-lane package preflight after full baseline exposure profiling.
correction_note: Olórin's Searing Light was removed from the corrected hand-filter package queue because its active rule scope is removal/edict, not hand-filter. The smoke gate that showed a positive result for Olórin over Improvisation Capstone is retained as invalid cross-lane evidence and must not be used for deck promotion.

packages.hypothesis: Valakut Awakening has verified hand-filter MDFC runtime and natural exposure. This tests whether lower-cost instant-speed hand smoothing and a land back face improve the Lorehold miracle window over Improvisation Capstone's current draw/filter Lesson slot without cutting ramp, protection, pressure, or finishers.
packages.cut_safety_override_reason: Expanded hand-filter model requires explicit miracle-core override for same-lane Improvisation Capstone benchmark; protected registry and prior evidence are still enforced.

packages.hypothesis: Valakut Awakening challenges Reforge the Soul as a same-lane hand-filter slot. This preserves ramp, protection, removal, pressure, recursion, and finisher anchors while testing whether targeted bottom-then-draw smoothing beats a five-mana wheel/miracle draw effect in the current 607 shell.

Wheel of Fortune has verified multiplayer discard-draw runtime and strong hand-filter exposure. This tests whether a compact wheel improves Lorehold's miracle and spell-chain reload over Improvisation Capstone's current draw/filter Lesson slot.
packages.cut_safety_override_reason: Expanded hand-filter model requires explicit miracle-core override for same-lane Improvisation Capstone benchmark; protected registry and prior evidence are still enforced.

packages.hypothesis: Wheel of Fortune challenges Reforge the Soul as the lower-cost wheel in the same hand-filter lane. This keeps the rest of deck 607's miracle, pressure, protection, and finisher shell intact.
